star_1.text: I only ever spent $5 on this game so I could get the daily blue box plus some other nick-knacks. But then after a while I find that the removed access to it just out of the blue??? That is straight up robbery. And then some bosses get so difficult you have no choice but to pay for upgrades. F*** that! How some people have blown 1000's of $$$ into this is baffling. The game was fun to play for a while but the developer's greed got old quick. Even $5 is way too much for that type of nonsense.

I used to play this game, but i quit. Good for the first few levels, but it gets 1000x harder. Projectiles and enemies run at the speed of light, and many enemies take like 100000 hits. THEY JUST WON'T DIE!!!! And you can NOT upgrade further since you barely get coins per level, and upgrades are WAY TOO COSTLY. It takes too long to progress through, and it's a BIG WASTE OF TIME!!!! No matter what type of ship you are using, one hit, and you die. This game's literal trash unless you put money.

Truly the worst of the worst when it comes to pay-to-win trash. If the normal loot boxes, purchasable currency and ships weren't bad enough, in the multiplayer function of the game, they blatantly pit you against players who have the objectively best ship in the game which either takes 1000's of hours to get or you have spend a hell of a lot of money to get. "This is the best ship in the game" is literally the description. I'm not lying. Spend your time and money elsewhere, seriously.

This game was my addiction for a long time. I played it everyday but then it started glitching. Any money that I spent on this game to buy extra gems and VIP points they would take and I'd get my items but then the game would update itself and I'd lose the items that I just bought. I'd also lose levels that I'd spent weeks getting passed. I've tried reaching out to the game designers or whoever twice now and I've gotten no response. Never again will they get anything from me.

The definition of a pay to win is: players who have money to spend can get more advanced ships and upgrades faster than a person who doesn't pay. Thus, this game is a pay to win. Also, there are energy points used each time you play a level. This limits the number of times you can play in a day without paying real money to continue playing. These two items together are unacceptable. I reloaded the game and reevaluated the game. While it is fun it still has these two problems. Deleted!

"Pay to win" element is WAY too strong. It started off fun. The graphics are well done. The controls are simple. But once the difficulty starts ramping up, it gets too hard, too fast, and the only way to handle it is to pay. I wouldn't mind needing coins to level up the combat power of the ship or purchase power ups for tough levels IF there were a way to grind lower levels for coins; but once you beat a level, the reward for replaying it drops to almost nothing.

The gameplay is very fun and enjoyable. However the game crashes very ofteb, especially when your ship is at max and there are a lot of bullets and enemies on screen. Also it seems to crash out of nowhere almost every time an ad is played. I can't count how many times the game crashed on me when I was near the end of a level. Really gets my blood boiling. But other that, when I can actually play the game it is fun.

Greed is killing this game. Even if you ignore the fact that it costs as much as a AAA game for one ship, it's now so weighted against you even in the early levels that shelling out a ton of cash is the only way to get anywhere. Undo this update (which was only marked as "bug fixes", by the way). edit: I came back to try this again after a bit, and all my progress is gone. no ships, no levels, nothing. uninstalled.

This game has it all! Greedy devs! One shot deaths! One life per session! Supersonic enemy bullets! Enemy homing bullets! You shoot a million bullets that can't dent an empty pop can! Multiplayer hacks...I get the format. Pay to play/get an advantage/have some fun. So i paid. I watched ad after ad. I upgraded. I played a campaign level about 25-30 times today. Failed every attempt. Wheres the fun in that. I just want to save the galaxy. If i want to fail...i already do that every day.

good. for the first 10 levels. then the enemies deliberately run into you at the speed of light. and when you nearly finish some levels, enemies come from the bottom for some dumsh*t reason leaving you no room to move and you can't kill them quickly due to them needing 10000 hits to kill it seems at times. sucks too. was about to invest $$$. but not since you clearly showed you wanna make the levels very hard right out the gate. not a good way to do business

Loved it and know I hate it. First few weeks was fun despite all the adds for credits, I didn't mind. After a while it wouldn't give me the gifts I worked for. It would take away gifts and the added weapon upgrades only kept me watching more and more adds. This spaceship game went from 5 stars to 1... I might try it out again in the future, but at this time, I'll stay in a galaxy far, far away.

Player vs player is also awful in that the player yo Very disappointing unless you have a lot of money to spend. Update: Paid to upgrade ship and was able to move farther but find they have updated game play making it harder again to move forward. Happened again. Keep moving the goal post. July 2021. No more daily gifts. No more crystals or chests. Paid for this but out of no where it just stoped. Not sure why. Constantly moving the bar so you have to buy or pay to play.

The game is fun at first, but once you start getting to the higher levels it becomes clear that if you want to progress you have to either grind hours into your ships and pay for the ridiculously high prices of the higher tier ships, or you could go pay to win and just buy the starter pack, which i did. Unfortunately it seems that the pack is a scam, because even though I bought and own the pack, it did not give me the ship. I'd rate 0 stars if I could, because I've basically been robbed.

I use to love this game. Then came all the items that are overly priced, people hacking the game to cheat. If you dont purchase items with money there is no way you can compete with someone who does. Very disappointed with the game developers, they make it to where you have to spend money, are you better get use to having no chance in battling someone who spends money. To many as. I'm seriously getting ready to delete the game and find a different one to play.

Game continuously crashes. I haven't been able to play in 2 days because of the crashing. When it finally does work, as soon as I click to play PVP, it crashes again and takes away energy points. If this happens twice in a row you get an error message saying you have to wait 15 minutes to play again. So I am penalized for the system crashing. Fed up, I have deleted the game.

A countdown limiting the chance you have in order to watch an ad get a"Save me???" Yet another step in the wrong direction. Or maybe I should actually... THANK YOU because now I don't have to watch yet another 30 second ad! I've never played any game with this many very looong ads! Ads, ads, ADS!! This app is fun for sure.... Or was. I think I need to find another "fun" game not so completely consumed with forced repetitive and very long ads. It's ridiculous.

I hate it. Because it throws everything at you, expecting you to get through it. Since powerups are randomized, AKA, extra bullet count and more dmg, it makes the game harder. Like you can go so unprepared with no power into a wave, and die. That's what I hate about it, it expects the player to get through each level effeciently, that's not the case. And it even bugs out from time to time. I wish it would be more fair. I'm uninstalling.

Game was fun... at first. There are ads throughout the game And often you must watch an ad in order to continue or to take part in some type of bonus. 95% of the ads are at least 30 seconds long and you have to watch the entire ad in order to get your reward. This is just an attempt to get you to purchase is the add free experience. The last week the game has been riddled with bugs and completely crashes multiple times when trying to start. The only fix is to completely reboot my phone.

Poor reception and to be a great player you'll need to purchase things to get to higher levels. I've played this game for almost 2 years and it's getting worse! Been 8 years now and lost 80% of things earned. Had to start completely over with ships that has evolved already. Troubles with glitches during playtime. Takes to long to level up. It's ridiculous on what you need to earn a new ship.

This a fantastic game. It just requires $$$ to advance far into the game. I have been playing the game now for about a month and am to level 49 on the campaign and no money spent yet. However, a glitch has developed. Always have 100 of energy when I load the game play 1 round of the game and it depletes all the energy. Prior to this it was 5 energy consumption per try. Either the developers are greedy or its an actual glitch.

star_2.text: Decent if they fix the cards/freezing issues, however, they REALLY push the pay aspect of the game. This is just a shiny version of asteroids from like the 70s, the shear odasity of trying to get people to pay hundreds of dollars to play something that is so absolutely basic, boggles my mind... Especially considering that some probably do. After playing for a while, I will update this. Not only is the game P2W, it's also absolutely choked with ads... For christ sake, chose one or the other.

This game has some serious issues. Repetitive gameplay that becomes frustrating cheap rather than skill based challenging. Starts off OK, but you get to some of the higher levels, and you get kamikazied by a sh!tload of enemies that swarm in from out of the screen with no way to avoid time after time. And the amount of money they charge for in-app purchases. It's outlandish. And for how much they charge for how much you get, you can buy a full priced console game. It's ridiculous. Take a hint.

The game in theory is good, but in reality nothing feels right. You can grab 20 drops in play, but after the 5th it doesn't really increase anything. There needs to be better metrics, nothing adds up there way it should. Seems like you're perpetually stuck in a basic level with basic gear no matter what you grab. I want to like this game but it's all flash and no substance.

Fun but it will cost too much. Gets very buggy the farther you get into it. Then it starts doubling up and sometimes tripling up the adds without giving you credit. Locks up after it already accepted tokens or after completing a hard level. You lose the tokens and don't get credit for the level. Too hard and takes too long to accumulate enough stones to get upgrades. The only real way within a reasonable amount of time is to pay real cash for items. Needs help files to explain upgrades.

I love the graphics and interaction. The shooting is fun. Beside that, nothing else is good. All things need money. The best ship cost $79.99??? You must be joking. The weird part is: even if you spent $79.99 to buy that ship, you can't start with the ship, you need to wait for it to be dropped. I don't mind watching ads to get coins, but I hit to the point that every turn in the game requires money. It's time to uninstall the game.

Constantly updated so that your progress is wiped out and you need to spend money. I've been playing this for a couple years, and was deep into my progress at one point spent 100's of$ and now I'm so far out ranked it's pointless. PVP is so lopsided it's a joke. You NEVER play a fair game. Its easy to tell because of the ship drops and drone attacks (newly added and only available to those who pay). I've had the game cheat on me too - just randomly get extremely hard, repeat levels, etc.

Even though this is my favorite game to play; the go to game when i want to pass time, but the game cheats. There is a feature in which you spin the wheel and our somehow nearly ALWAYS give you the single powerup, and will stop on either side of the 10k slot. I'll give these guys a little time to fix that, but if they don't fix that then I'll find me a next "go to" its one thing for the wheel to stop randomly to whatever award, but to rig it to do so...?!??

This game was once very good. As the updates continued, game got worse with the bugs. For the past 4 days, you cannot accumulated clan points, sometimes your quest points don't get accounted for. But the request to purchase packs, sales and items are there each and everyday. The developers obviously don't care anymore. They made their money so they're abandoning the game.

I tried and uninstalled because of a couple reasons. The tutorial is horrible. It barely shows you what to do, barely explains how the process works, etc. It is advertised as a shooter type arcade game, but there is waaaaay more involved in that. Once playing, the levels get very difficult early on, and I'm sure here are power ups, but you have no idea. Also, it is very clear early on that to advance in any meaningful way you need to spend money and a lot of it. Better arcade style games around

I've been playing this game for along time and I've enjoyed it. I had stopped playing the game for a couple weeks. Last week I went to play the game and all my progress was lost. I MEAN EVERYTHING I HAD ACCOMPLISHED WAS GONE!!! I had to start all over.... couldn't log into my old account or anything. Now when I play the game I'm experiencing all types of problems. Game freezing, game closing itself out, not recognizing when videos are played which means I have to play the videos 2 to 3 time

Changing my mind. The balance is horrible. Especially between Medium difficulty and Hard. The jump in difficulty is way too great. And don't waste money on paying for no ads when ads basically drive the game for you to benefit. You have to click ads to improve things😄, or pay cash. Item explanation is hard to find, I still haven't found a help file. Overall, I'm not playing this game ever again.

Newest updates are horrible. They just want you to spend more and more money. Also a glitch has showed up that doesn't let me use a booster when I spin the wheel during infinite mode. And it doesn't even put it in inventory. I will wait for next update but this game, I am afraid, is headed to the delete pile. Did not delete due to the fix of the previously mentioned glitch. However game play is still not much fun anymore. Also the ads seem to be getting longer and longer. Bumped up to 2 stars.

FRUSTRATED I'm pleased with the game. I'm not one to pay big money for the upgrades. I enjoy playing the game and trying to beat each level. I was up to level 90 I think. had almost all 3 levels beat in each stage. I had almost all upgrades on the ships I collected. I also had almost 2million coins and over 300 hundred crystals saved up. But when they updated their game I lost everything I had worked so hard to get. I had to start over from the very beginning I'M A VERY UNHAPPY CAMPER.

No easy levels, all medium, hard and extreme. Money hungry bunch also, lots of pay to win. The levels scale quickly leaving little enjoyment in playing the game. And the final kicker for me is when you die you can watch an ad for a second chance, 99% of the time you watch the ad and the app dies and has to be restarted. I wouldn't recommend to anyone I know. Sad they're so greedy

This game is great, really decent graphics, cool levels...but sadly, like so many other awesome games on here, the ads ruin it. Some of the ads are a minute plus, then another 15 second countdown before you can close the ad..PLUS sometimes you don't even get the reward for the ad. Unfortunately this kills it for me, and I uninstalled. Maybe if they fix the ad issue I'll try again some time.

I placed a negative review on this game about a year ago, and felt I should revise it, having downloaded it again. It's gotten even worse. Almost impossible to make progress in the game unless you constantly buy upgrades to compete against people you are paired with that massively outrank you. Never again, which sucks because it used to be a great game to play.

I take it back. I used to crave this game but its so full of bugs. I just lost gold because the game just got stuck. oh, well....lost other things because the game just froze in place. and the bosses: you're pouring fire into them and they don't move. but let one speck of their fire touch your ship and you're dead. right now the spin wheel used to time down and you'd get a free spin. guess what's happening now? frozen. game sucks anymore. still stuck on level 39, no end in sight.

Gameplay is simple enough. Though its constantly asking you to buy stuff anywhere from $1 to $100. The coins you need to upgrade and buy ships jump up a lot so you need to play a lot if you dont want to spend real money. And if you spend money/coins on the ships you dont really get to play as them unless you get the random upgrade drops during missions or gets the random cards from the loot boxes to start off as those ships. It seems you can choose them if you decide to spend real money to get their VIP statuses.

My first review was only one star due to an annoying ratings request that won't leave until you've gone to the ratings screen. It disrupts gameplay in an extreme way. That's still an issue, but after some time to play into it, it only gets one more star. There's too much to spend resources on for upgrades, and the game doesn't reward enough resources for upgrades to keep up with the difficulty slope. That is making it feel cash-grabby and unduly complex. It's also very laggy. Uninstalling.

It's a great game. Been playing for awhile, but the last update just erased all my progress from both my Facebook and google play accounts. I have logged back in to both separately, I have restarted the phone and application countless times. This is not the first time it has happened and it will cause me my will to play the game if my progress can just be continually erased like this. Please fix.

star_3.text: A 5 star game but I'm rating 3 stars for some of the annoying things that happen during gameplay. My biggest peeve being that spinwheel that pops up in the middle of endless mode. It's a good concept, and it wouldn't be a bad thing...if the game paused when it pops up. But it doesn't, and as a result, your ship can be destroyed or you miss power ups. Because although you can't play while the wheel is onscreen, the aliens can still do everything they normally do. Good game tho.

The gameplay is fun a varied, and provides for lots of room for growth with your ships and drones. The main problem is the multitude of ads. For you to get almost any rewards or bonuses you have to watch 30 second ads, to the point where I'll watch maybe 3-4 ads in a 5 minute span after dying. You can skip the ads, but what you're giving up feels like a real dick punch. The worst part is, purchasing VIP level 1 indicates that it "removes ads" - but this is a blatant lie! It does not. Shame!

Great at first. After about level 55 or so, you either have to buy a better equipped shipped (with money, not in-game coin) or just go back to earlier levels. You'll never get the crystals required to buy what you need. They really shouldn't have such high prices with all the ads they play. I'll keep it a while to play the earlier levels but I'll uninstall after it gets boring. I'm not paying money just to fairly play later levels.

The game is pretty fun to play but it had it flaws. To unlock one of the better ships is cost $49.99. You can use gold to purchase a one time use of a better ships, but I'd say 9 times out of 10 I just happen to kill an alien close to me that offers a worse ship and I cannot move out of the way in time. It's irritating paying 10,000 gold for the best ship only to lose it in the 1st or second rounds of the level because an alien ship that offers a worse ship just "happens" to get destroyed too close to me. It's also funny how that rarely happens when I don't purchase the use of a better ships.

Fun little game but I agree with some other reviewers that the prices listed are extremely exorbitant.  I appreciate that ABI put this game out for free, with ads, but I'm okay with the ads.  I'll never spend the amounts they have listed in the game.  I'm at level 60 without paying for anything, except my time.  I would venture to say that if ABI significantly reduced their prices, they would make up what they wanted on volume of purchases.  Just my opinion.    Other than that, the game keeps crashing for no apparent reason.  It usually happens when I'm battling the BOSS at the end of a level.  As I"m scrolling my finger around on the screen, it just closes the game and goes to my home screen.  I use a Pixel 2.  Not sure if it's this Alien Shooter app or my phone.  That said, it's relatively fun for being free with ads.

Love the game itself. There is a great deal of room for improvement though. Tons of ads. Plus the price of in app purchases is outrageous. You woukd need to apply fir a small loan to ne able to make them. Just rediculous. Finally, if you upgrade a ship for a quest/campaign/game...that ship should be available to you for the remainder of plau for that game.

The game is really fun and addictive, but the game quickly shows its true face as a cash grab. The cost of microtransactions is legitamately insulting, and past the first 40 or so levels, it becomes a slow grind to keep your ships powered up enough to continue without them. Occasional cheap enemy attacks from off-screen and below often make the game turn frustrating in a hurry. You can watch a 30 second add to get one extra life, but that's it.

It's incredibly fun. But where it suffers is its need for microtransactions. You can't buy higher level ships with gold, you have to use the crystals, which you get not often, or you can pay a stupidly high amount of money. The highest level ship uses a currency that you can only get from loot boxes. Higher level bosses almost require these high level ships too. Despite all this, it's a great game to waste time with.

When I first got the game, it was very fun. The level of difficulty was very fair. Since the latest updates, it seems the developers have advanced the aliens and bosses and their defense mechanisms. The player's ships and weaponry have not advanced much but also have become harder to obtain. The game is no longer fun and has become more about the developers extorting money. Frustrating!

The quick version doesn't do the download version justice. On the other hand, the game itself makes it quite difficult to enjoy. I would like to constantly upgrade my ships rather than swap between 3 and max at 7. The "Super" powerup is amazing, but is ultimately becomes worthless due to when it drops. Overall, a good idea but poor execution. I rather not play past 10 levels, but I did anyway.

I wish I could uninstall the update that changed the game. After the update, endless is no longer endless, might as well be levels. I liked how I could pass waves endlessly until I died. No longer the case. The cost of spins and tournaments more than doubled in price to play. I used to play a lot and really liked the game. Now, I'm considering uninstalling the game.

I play this on my tablet and the graphics tend to overwhelm the device. I've tried to find a setting that won't do that but to no avail. I asked the question on fb, but no response. Fun game! There are some things I'm not a fan of like rating 5 stars gets a daily bonus but it's free if you want. The graphics seam to be a bit much for my tablet so slight screen freeze followed by my ship getting killed. I don't see a way to turn down the fidelity which would make it easier on the graphics.

I've played this game off and on for a few years. it's fun, and you can upgrade ships. but now the ads are making it unable to get rewards. before you watch an ad, and then you get a reward. now, when you click on the button when the ad is over it takes you straight to Google play. then you have to reload the game and you lose the reward you were trying to get. like double coins or spinning the wheel for a power up for a boss battle.

Good game, but do not expect to gather enough ship pieces to evolve into any of the cool ships or to do any of the cool stuff you see you see in the ads. Even if you spend money and buy the ship, you still need the pieces to eventually evolve. Some ships take 100 pieces to evolve to level 1 of evolving. Plus, you got to have gems and missles for that level also. I'm at level 120 and haven't been able to evolve yet. Keep in mind there's about 10 different ships you are collecting pieces for.

Game is constantly freezing. When it starts over, you lose everything you gained in that game. I literally can’t advance be a of this. There used to be a place to contact the controllers of the game but that option seems to be no longer available. I’ve spent way too much money to ha e to experience your his. There should be some type of compensation.

Been playing for a while now. I have no idea what the point of all the spinning wheels are for as I cannot figure out how to use any of the perks you win. One on One is and can be quite unfair due to you, or other players getting more perks than the other player. There has been countless times when I lose a match because I get no perks and lose because the other player got a bunch of perks and won because he/she was able to advance in the game. The layout is confusing and I have no idea what all the perks are considering (as I said earlier) I have no idea what they do and how to use them. Upgrading ships is expensive and I have never put a penny into this game and am over level 80 and have over a 64% win ratio with online players with over 1,600 games played. The game is okay, but confusing as hell and can get annoying as perks are not equally distributed (the little sergeant stripes that fall from the sky).

I really enjoy playing this game aside from the countless ads. I have tolerated them for a long time as I struggle to achieve all rewards. There have been a lot of mild bugs, easily ignored but the latest one is a deal breaker. Lately when I watch the ads, I no longer get my reward. THIS SHOULD NEVER HAPPEN in an add driven game. I don't use FaceBook which seems to be their only support option. Note: Clearing the cache helped temporarily.

I'm locked into a subscription without any way of unsubscribing. Don't subscribe. I thought I only made a one time purchase. It ended up to be $15/mo. bill. For a game? My Netflix is cheaper! Don't do it. There's no way to contact customer service in the game! I'm afraid even if I uninstall the game I'll still be stuck w/the subscription.

The game play is fun, if not nearly impossible in the higher levels even with maxed out ships. The greed of the company is insane... ads everywhere, even with a substantial VIP level. Finally, the developer straight up lies about probability in the game (crystal drops from bosses, legendary ship parts from crates, etc) with fairly simple math you will find them to be much lower than they claim. I've calculated out things individually, for instance, when you make 6 attempts in a row of something with a 60% hit attempt and not hit it... something you would have a 99.59% chance of hitting.... it happens like that all the time.

I would have rated the game higher - it IS a lot of fun - but their support is terrible. I spent the better part of a year working my way through the levels, unlocking new ships... even spent a fair bit of real money on upgrades. Then I had to get a new phone, and - even though the game supposedly syncs up with your Facebook account AND has an option to save your progress to the server - I lost EVERYTHING. Logged in to my account and was back to zero, so I posted on their Facebook page (apparently the only way to contact them) and have waited weeks for a response. Numerous other players have chimed in with the same complaint, to no avail. I liked the have, but not enough to start all over and lost all my hard work - especially when the developer doesn't seem to care about his customers. Uninstalling for good...

star_4.text: Great fun time killing game. However, the pricing is a little on the ridiculous side. I would probably spend money on this game if it were more reasonably priced, say in the same range as a standard XBOX or Playstation game for purchase. Being as there are still advertisements in the game play it seems like this could be done. And with the prices being the way they are it makes it almost impossible to get past a certain level before you would have to start buying add-ons. Because of the ridiculous price and the inability to continue game play past a certain point without starting to by things, I can only give four stars. Fix the pricing and five stars it is.

The game is quite fun and very challenging, perhaps overly challenging if you don't pay to win, but it is possible with (a lot of) patience and skill to get good upgrades. The RMT costs are far too high for an arcade shooter. When the cost of a single ship (Legendary) is about the same as a new release Bethesda title, that's a problem. But, you can earn just about anything without P2W if willing to invest 100s, if not 1000s of hours in gameplay.

I'm new to this game after playing galaxy Invaders alien shooter for a number of years. The new game is really good but it's a bit disappointing that players who've spent lots of money on the Invaders game aren't looked after by ABI following the loss of support, I think it's the least they can do to be honest. I also used 100000 coins to make my own clan and it's disappeared as if it never existed, although the coins are still gone. Other than this, the game is very enjoyable.

a nice switch from the other one, Galaxy attack is somewhat better the Galaxy shooter,, having the same software, the games format is laid out similar, however on the mini games for watching videos and collecting points they're slightly different. considering your request, I'll reevaluate the format and then modify my review,, ty...

it seems like this game has grown into its shoes and walks runs in them well. I have been playing the app on my phone for many of moons... they have grown and they keep working out thier problems but then again ..we aren't made to be happy always disgruntled but they do have this event game called "universe x" which they should make it a game on its own ... its actually one of the main reasons I keep coming back... but it has seasons and we don't see it as often but it's worth the wait.

Lots of the times I don't get the bonus . They take my crystals . PVP I can never win always playing player way more advanced then me. So there's no way to win or they through very difficult defense and get killed when seconds. Not fair they favor other players it seems like.
I think this is a fun game with hardly any bugs and good game play but I want to point out some flops and that is energy that limits your game time and events appear too often .
It doesn't give me any thing for my ships I have been playing for over a year and I don't have much for my ships or anything else it's getting a little better

A good game but there's only two problems.First of all,when I want to buy some ships on the upgrade section,the ships are too expensive for me when I'm new here.Please lower the prices so I won't grind too long.Lastly,when I shoot at the aliens at some levels,they need to be shooted at least 10 times which is hard for me.But still,a good game
it is so fun I love the game that I even tell my brother to play it it's worth the time if u have time to play it give it a try really worth it !!!

I enjoyed this game. I had unlocked ships to Legendary and upgraded them, but all my progress disappeared. It's been around 1 year. If this problem can be fixed, please fix it so i can keep playing this game. If you need my cardinals, i will provide them.
it's better... by that i just mean so much more content to spend literally hundreds of Hours of Dollars getting...
the ads keep taking me out of the app, then I dont get the reward for watching the ad.
Have unclicked the "Notication of the Clan Market" but unsuccessful. Received numerous notifications daily of such & even in minutes which is so annoying. 👎🏻😡😡😡
This game can still be buggy at times, but their customer service is way better now when it comes to solving problems, and overall, it's a fun game.
great graphics, just far too many bugs in every update, I do love this game

It's alot of fun! The prices are kind of crazy though. I like that you can chat with other players, but there are some creepy people on there, and there isn't a block button, so you have to be very careful. I had someone find my Facebook account and kept harassing me for a while, but that eventually stopped :( if you have kids that play this game, keep them out of the chat room if you can.

Lots of complaints about ads. I agree they are annoying. That said, I am reinstalling this game after a year or two away, because I remember it being a very fun mindless way to kill some time. I never purchased anything and got pretty far; while it sounds like there are legit complaints about PvP matching and some bugs, the users saying it's impossible to win without paying are wrong. This style of game is just very hard at high levels :)

For the second time I am having an issue where the game is not reseting itself daily at midnight as it has for the past 2 years. The game works although no new daily missions, no daily videos to watch to earn boosters and coins, none of my daily gifts from reaching VIP levels are being received either. Basically the game acts like it has been going for the last 3 days as if it were 1 long day. I enjoy this game so you can understand my frustration. Please advise and fix ASAP Thanks.

I like the game, it's fun and honestly addictive but it's gotten hard enough to where it's barley enjoyable anymore as far as the endless mode anyway. Haven't been able to pass a level for almost a year. Still a fun game but would be nice to be able to make it further in the game or have more single player options that aren't so difficult.

star_5.text: It'll remind you of your old arcade favorite, except this one has lots of different things for you. Not to mention the fact that now since the last update or so, it's more challenging! But I have a complaint, why is everything including the ships (if you want to get them earlier in the game) so damn expensive? For instance, $29.99 or $39.99 for one of their better ships(only if you don't want to wait until you pass a certain level in Campaign mode) and $99.99 for a package deal (it includes a better ship along with some merchandise), come on guys, can't you make the ships and merchandise more affordable for the people who can't afford to just fork out that much money?

The game is pretty awesome. Might I suggest controller support (tried it with my PS3 controller and wouldn't work). I know most of it is touch screen and you won't be as quick as you are like with touch, but would be pretty cool as the finger does tend to get in the way a bit. Awesome none the less. Maybe at the bottom right, show what weapon you picked up along with it's strength and fire rate. Would be cool to see, but not a must.

At first the game was great. Was very fun to play. Then I found that the save game function was less than functional. It does save same of the game for you, but you lose most of your upgrades, drones and game boost cards. So you end up starting over. And now for the pass few weeks the game play SUCKs. Due to unkillable low level no name mobs. That you end up killing yourself to get out of the loop. So you are not able to advance in the game.

Using Samsung Galaxy Note 10 plus, the graphics are beautifully crisp, smooth and very well illustrated. My only concern is the trades made within the game such as buying new fighters using earned coins. You never really "buy" any. You only can select them at a reduced price before gameplay. They could use the word "activate" or "unlock" instead of "buy" which is misleading by content to me. However, I still play this game for a few mins everyday and enjoy it.

I love playing this Space shooter game. It has its problems, But it is worth Playing this game If you have time to try it you should download this game. ;) it's worth the money to get Skip advertisements. there is no issue about the game except a few thanks. but your team is on the problems trying to fix them. have a Good day today, love it won't replace it for other shooting games unless it is A A.B.I. GAME;)

honestly the game is fun and engaging, man is it hard to get some stuff without paying though. SUPER glad I got the no ads forever before it discontinued EDIT: one thing is when you are participating in an event and then it ends when you haven't used up all your tokens (like the ticket event. It just ended and I had 90 stars which are now just gone. kind of sucks) all events should have a grace period like the main ones do
I have this game installed on 2 mobiles. and I finished more than 100 levels and bought more than 10 ships. But unable to sync the game. Please help

Why can't you carry over the type and power level of the ship to the next mission? but you can become addicted. graphics are outstanding. I'm on the second time around , just can't put it down. only fault is that it tells you to update ship but you can't

love ❤️ this game. This game is really great lots of action with a clan. Some parts of the game are harder than others But I sure like the challenges That's why I keep coming back to play. If you haven't played before you need to try it out. It's very intense Thank you for the years of game play
...If you're looking for an optional fix for a Galaga round....then this is the perfect game. I just stumbled upon it and SO glad I did....the graphics are pretty awesome too...Thank you 😁

I love the game, but today my ABI tickets (secret camera, super gear, metal hammer, battle shovel, etc.) were not working. I would get some in campaign and they would disappear by the time I finished the battle and returned to the main screen. I never had this problem before, I believe is a bug in the game. I hope you can look into this matter so I can continue enjoying the game. Thx!

Fun action game, with lots of things you can achieve. Am liking it even more now that I've found a really active clan - that's made all the difference! Some of the levels are too hard though. And the Black Market says it needs an update to work, but the app store says it's up to date. Happy to have found it again after giving it a rest for a year.
I got all of my data and clan back! It tooka month but it was a hard situation. The team at ABI stuck with me and we got it figured out!! Thanks soo much guys!!! You did it!!!
I just love this game...I've played it for years...The bigger the level you go..the harder it will become...great for hand eye coordination...
Id die before i even quit this game I love it so much I'd attempt playing it in someone's house when I'm a ghost id even kill to play this again they are one of last good mobile games
it has actually a good amount of things to do with pvp, events and all and good rewards also.

lots of fun just like when I was a teenager. Has the old feel old style but made for today, very colorful, and I just learn it's off line !!I love to play games like this I like it because there are levels of difficulty I can choose from. Love this game 5 Stars all day long for sure l.

It shouldn't be so difficult for a normal player to get a new drone or plane that they can't get it for years, and VIP players should get it in a matter of days.And the fun in this game is not in any other game.

okay so I've been playing this for almost 9 years now. you say the difficulty curve has improved ?? let me disagree because I too am a software eng. and what's happening is that your algo. isn't well constructed cuz you force players to pay in order to pass a level or even in PVP! combat power is the calibre, and that's not entirely true, so please put more effort in the game and improve it rather than driving old players away ☺️
Fun game. Reminds of the old space invaders game we use to play on the calculator in school lol.
